mapper.select: select p.id, p.cover_url as coverUrl, p.title, p.content, u.username, p.like_count as likeCount, p.comment_count as commentCount, case when pl.id is null then false else true end as liked, p.status, p.create_time as createTime from post p left join user u on p.user_id = u.id left join post_like pl on pl.post_id = p.id and pl.user_id = #{userId} where p.user_id = #{userId} and p.is_deleted = 0 order by p.create_time desc

select p.id, p.cover_url as coverUrl, p.title, p.content, u.username, p.like_count as likeCount, p.comment_count as commentCount, case when pl.id is null then false else true end as liked, p.status, p.reject_reason as rejectReason, p.create_time as createTime from post p left join user u on p.user_id = u.id left join post_like pl on pl.post_id = p.id and pl.user_id = #{currentUserId} where p.id = #{id} and p.is_deleted = 0 limit 1

select id, user_id as userId, cover_url as coverUrl, title, content, like_count as likeCount, comment_count as commentCount, status, reject_reason as rejectReason, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, is_deleted as isDeleted from post where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0 limit 1

select id, user_id as userId, cover_url as coverUrl, title, content, like_count as likeCount, comment_count as commentCount, status, reject_reason as rejectReason, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, is_deleted as isDeleted from post where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId} and is_deleted = 0 limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into post ( user_id, cover_url, title, content, like_count, comment_count, status, reject_reason ) values ( #{userId}, #{post.coverUrl}, #{post.title}, #{post.content}, 0, 0, 0, null )
mapper.update: update post set cover_url = #{post.coverUrl}, title = #{post.title}, content = #{post.content}, status = 0, reject_reason = null where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId} and is_deleted = 0
update post set is_deleted = 1 where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
